title: Evident Powder Snow
body: You loss on the top of the mountion. It was very cold,very cold...... Suddenly, you fell in to a pile of powder snow. You are freezing to death. You don't know how to get out. After that, you died, and lost your hardcore world. You were very sad. Than, you have to hear this. Evident Powder Snow is a Minecraft resource pack. It retexture powder snow, so you never will freeze to death again in powder snow, unless you walk into powder snow on purpose  :) ### **YOU SHOULD KNOW**: 1.You can simply drag this into the resource pack folder, after which everything should work. 2.This resource pack retexture the texture of powder snow in Minecraft and is compatible with Vanilla. ## Features: 1.You can see the texture of powder snow is more obvious. 2.Runs smoothly with Vanilla. 3.Perfectly fit into Minecraft. 4.Totaly FREE to download!
